title: Touch of Alchemy
description: A mod that adds more options to Minecraft's potion-making systems.
body:
**Requires Curios API!**

_Have you ever looked at the Suspicious Stews in Minecraft and wished that you could get the effects in potion form? Ever wanted to create strange brews with unusual effects? Do you just wanna make Nether Warts last longer? Well, wish no longer!_

Touch of Alchemy adds a method to take suspicious stew flowers and other herbs, and grind them into mashes that you can brew into proper potions!

Using mashed herbs, and other materials you can make or find in the world, you can create mystical Alchemical brews with unusual effects, like transforming mobs into bats, or transmuting blocks into gold! _(There are currently only two alchemical brews at the moment, but more are planned!)_
